title: 18.-Purchase Order: Samuel Kidane dba Life Long Tennis Academy

sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution authorizing the City Manager to execute a purchase order and any
amendments with Samuel Kidane dba Life Long Tennis Academy to provide youth and
adult tennis services for the City of Berkeley for a total amount not to exceed $270,000
through June 20, 2026.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
Funds for these services are generated directly from Life Long Tennis Academy program
revenues. The City registers participants, collects the revenue, and provides facilities, then
pays Life Long Tennis Academy from the revenue collected for their services. The amount
of actual expenditures will vary from year to year depending on the number of participants
enrolled in the program. Funding is available in the FY25 and FY26 Camps Fund budget,
and additional amounts will be requested through the Annual Appropriations process as
needed.
sections.current_situation:
Life Long Tennis Academy runs 15-20 monthly tennis classes for hundreds of youth and
adults at various City locations. The City registers participants for programs through its
registration software platform and then pays Life Long Tennis a percentage of the revenue
for their services on a regular basis. The number of participants has grown each year and
additional purchasing authority is needed to provide these fee classes/programs for a
growing number of Berkeley residents.
sections.background:
The City has collaborated with Life Long Tennis Academy for over five years to offer tennis
programs to Berkeley residents. Community members learn tennis skills and compete in
tournaments at a variety of skill levels.
2180 Milvia Street, Berkeley, CA 94704 • Tel: 510.981.6700 • TDD: 510.981.6903 • Fax: 510.981.6710
E-mail: manager@CityofBerkeley.info Website : http://www.CityofBerkeley.info/Manager
Page 2 of 3
Purchase Order: Samuel Kidane dba Life Long Tennis Academy CONSENT CALENDAR
May 20, 2025
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
Life Long Tennis Academy provides a sustainable model for their programs by re-using
tennis balls and materials. Additionally, Life Long Tennis Academy is based locally which
reduces the miles driven and vehicle carbon emissions produced by program participants.
sections.rationale:
The City of Berkeley Parks Recreation and Waterfront Department staff does not have the
skill or capacity to offer high quality tennis programming. Contracting for these services with
Life Long Tennis Academy provides a high quality service that meets community needs.
sections.alternatives:
None
CONTACT PERSON
Scott Ferris, Director, Parks, Recreation & Waterfront Department, 981-6700
Justin Pitcher, Recreation Program Supervisor, 510-981-5123
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
PURCHASE ORDER: LIFE LONG TENNIS ACADEMY
WHEREAS, Life Long Tennis Academy runs 15-20 monthly tennis classes for youth and
adults at City locations; and
WHEREAS, the City registers program participants and collects fees through its registration
software platform, and then pays Life Long Tennis Academy a percentage of the
tournament revenues for its services on a regular basis; and
WHEREAS, the number of participants has grown each year for these fee
classes/programs and additional purchasing authority is needed to continue this service for
a growing number of Berkeley residents.
WHEREAS, FY25 and FY26 funds are available in the Playground Camp Fund (fund 125)
to cover this contract, and additional amounts will be requested during the annual
appropriations process as needed.
NOW THEREFORE BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that the City
Manager is authorized to execute a contract and any amendments with Samuel Kidane dba
Life Long Tennis Academy to provide youth and adult tennis services and tournaments for
a total amount not to exceed $270,000 through June 30, 2026. A record signature copy of
said contract and any amendments to be on file in the Office of the City Clerk.
